title: Perceptron on AND
summary: A deterministic pure-Python perceptron trace for a linearly separable truth table.
learning_objectives: Follow the perceptron update rule one sample at a time.
See how a bias and two input weights form a linear decision boundary.
Distinguish a fixed-capacity learning baseline from constructive growth.
limitations: This is a toy mechanism demonstration, not a reproduction of a published experiment.
The AND truth table is deliberately tiny and linearly separable.
This lab does not add, prune, or structurally adapt network capacity.
